mapper.select: SELECT id, name, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate FROM tb_category WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT name FROM tb_category WHERE id = #{categoryId}
SELECT id FROM tb_store WHERE distributor_account_id = #{currentUserId}
INSERT INTO tb_product_import VALUES (DEFAULT, DEFAULT, #{storeId}) RETURNING id
INSERT INTO tb_product_import VALUES (DEFAULT, DEFAULT, #{storeId}) RETURNING id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_product_import_detail(id, product_id, product_import_id, qty, price, category_id) VALUES (DEFAULT, #{productId}, #{importId}, #{qty}, #{price}, #{categoryId})
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM tb_category WHERE name = #{categoryName}
INSERT INTO tb_product VALUES (DEFAULT, #{name}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, true) RETURNING id

INSERT INTO tb_store_product_detail(id, store_id, product_id, qty, price, is_publish, image, category_id, description) VALUES (DEFAULT, #{storeId}, #{productId}, 0, 0, #{prod.isPublish}, #{prod.image}, #{prod.categoryId}, #{prod.description}) RETURNING id

SELECT a.id, b.name, a.qty, a.price, a.image, category_id, is_publish AS isPublish, b.created_date AS createdDate, b.updated_date AS updatedDate, a.description FROM tb_store_product_detail a JOIN tb_product b ON a.product_id = b.id WHERE a.id = #{productId} AND a.store_id = #{storeId}

SELECT a.id, b.name, a.qty, a.price, a.image, category_id, is_publish AS isPublish, b.created_date AS createdDate, b.updated_date AS updatedDate, a.description FROM tb_store_product_detail a JOIN tb_product b ON a.product_id = b.id WHERE a.id = #{storeProductDetailId}

SELECT a.id, b.name, a.qty, a.price, a.image, a.category_id, is_publish AS isPublish, b.created_date AS createdDate, b.updated_date AS updatedDate, a.description FROM tb_store_product_detail a JOIN tb_product b ON a.product_id = b.id WHERE a.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY ${by} ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT a.id, b.name, a.qty, a.price, a.image, a.category_id, is_publish AS isPublish, b.created_date AS createdDate, b.updated_date AS updatedDate, a.description FROM tb_store_product_detail a JOIN tb_product b ON a.product_id = b.id WHERE a.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY ${by} DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT x.id, name, qty, price, image, x.category_id, is_active AS isActive, is_publish AS isPublish, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate FROM tb_store_product_detail x JOIN tb_product y ON x.product_id = y.id WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND name ILIKE '%${name}%'

SELECT p.id, name, qty, price, image, is_active AS isActive, is_publish AS isPublish, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate FROM tb_product p INNER JOIN tb_store_product_detail s ON p.id = s.product_id WHERE store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY price ASC

UPDATE tb_store_product_detail SET product_id = #{productId}, price = #{prod.price}, image = #{prod.image}, description = #{prod.description}, category_id = #{prod.categoryId}, is_publish = true WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND id = #{id} RETURNING id
DELETE FROM tb_product WHERE id = #{productId}
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT id FROM tb_product WHERE name ILIKE '${name}'), 0)
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND id = #{productId})
SELECT count(*) FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE store_id = #{store}
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE id = #{id} AND store_id = #{storeId} AND is_publish = true)
SELECT product_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND id = #{id}
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE store_id = #{storeId})
